content.text:
Based on the provided image and analysis, I can now clearly identify the neighbor atoms of atom index 13 (O:13):

Looking at the molecule structure in the image:
- Atom O:13 (red sphere) is directly bonded to:
  1. C:12 (carbon, yellow/gold sphere) - visible bond between them
  2. H:15 (hydrogen, white sphere) - visible bond between them

The geomconf_index for this molecule is 7448, as indicated by the file name "geomconf_7448.xyz".

Therefore, the neighbor atoms of atom index 13 (O) are:
- Atom index 12, element C (carbon)
- Atom index 15, element H (hydrogen)

Geomconf_index: 7448

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 13, whose element should be O. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
